headline: Bitcoin ETFs See $100M Outflow as BTC Falls 10%

article.title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
article.summary: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.

article.title: Polymarket hit by $2.9M theft, users to be refunded
article.summary: Polymarket said it contained the compromise and removed the affected dependency after attackers injected a malicious script into its frontend.

headline: Gold Surges Past $4000 Amid Slowing Inflation

article.title: Gold Climbs Above $4,000 After Inflation Print Slows Decline
article.summary: Gold climbed above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest since November.

headline: Asia Tech Stocks Sink 5% on AI Cost Blow

article.title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Price
article.summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.

headline: Base Delays Beryl Fork Over Registry Issue

article.summary: Base delayed its Beryl mainnet upgrade to June 26 to give the B20 Activation Registry time to become fully operational.
